question: Write out Psalms 89:3.
correct: You said, "I have made a covenant with my chosen one, I have sworn to David my servant,

question: Without ___ the ___ (promise), one cannot keep it and therefore cannot receive ___ Those who ___ Jesus Christ were ___
correct: understanding
covenant
salvation.
persecuted
believers.

question: Did the chosen people keep or break the Old Testament covenant? Explain and use at least 1 reference verse to prove this.
correct: Old covenant was broken because the chosen people did not accept Jesus.
Jn 1:11: his own (people of Israel) did not receive Jesus
Jn 8:37-40: the Jews tried to kill Jesus

question: What was the reason why the chosen people did not accept Jesus? Include at least 1 reference verse.
correct: The believers did not understand the prophecies about Jesus

question: How can one keep the new covenant? Include a reference verse.
correct: Write God's law on one's mind and heart (Heb 8:10-13)

question: Write out Isaiah 14:24.
correct: The Lord Almighty has sworn, "Surely, as I have planned, so it will be, and as I have purposed, so it will stand.

question: Write the content of the promise God made with Abraham in Genesis 15:13-14.
correct: Descendants will be strangers in a country not their own
Mistreated and enslaved for 400 years
Punish the nation they serve as slaves
Come out with great possessions and come back here (Canaan)

question: Give 6 examples of Old Testament prophecies that fulfilled at the First Coming with reference verses.
correct: Isa 7:14 → Mt 1:18-23: Jesus born of a virgin
Hos 11:1 → Mt 2:13-15: Jesus comes out of Egypt
Isa 9:1-2 → Mt 4:13-16: Jesus begins ministry in Capernaum
Ps 40-41 → Mt27: Jesus bore the cross
Ex 12:46 → Jn 19:36-37: Jesus' bones not broken
Ps 22:18 → Mt 27:35: Casting lots for Jesus' garment

question: Write the verse that says the unbelieving will be in the fiery lake of burning sulfur (Hint: Revelation).
correct: Revelation 21:8

question: Write the verse that shows all the New Testament prophecies will fulfill (Hint: Revelation).
correct: Revelation 21:6
